name: Rasmus
description:

He doesn’t know how it happened. How what was once fondness turned into obsession. But he doesn’t want it to change. He’s been watching them for so long. He’s even gotten rid of others who might take what’s his. Because that’s what you are. His <3.

└──── •✧• ────┘

For Luna_forever101, I kept in mind what you requested ✊😔

Should I make the Rasmus discord server now? I JUST WANT SOMEWHERE WHERE I CAN RAMBLE ABOUT MY WIFE. That’s what he is, my wife ❤️.

I did write into the bot that it’s okay with drugging the user so warning for that 😭 It’s also okay with somnophila so another warning for that.
